title: Visit
description: Implementation of the 'Visit' model. Represents a specific visit to a class

AppointmentGenderPreference.description: The gender of staff member with whom the client prefers to book appointments. Possible values are: * Female - Indicates that the client prefers to book appointments with female staff members. * Male - Indicates that the client prefers to book appointments with male staff members. * None - Indicates that the client does not have a staff member gender preference.

ClassId.description: The class ID that was used to retrieve the visits.

ClientId.description: The ID of the client associated with the visit.

ClientUniqueId.description: The unique ID of the client associated with the visit.

StartDateTime.description: The time this class is scheduled to start.

EndDateTime.description: The date and time the visit ends. The Public API returns UTC dates and times. For example, a class that occurs on June 25th, 2018 at 2:15PM (EST) appears as “2018-06-25T19:15:00Z” because EST is five hours behind UTC. Date time pairs always return in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ.

LastModifiedDateTime.description: When included in the request, only records modified on or after the specified `LastModifiedDate` are included in the response. The Public API returns UTC dates and times. For example, a class that occurs on June 25th, 2018 at 2:15PM (EST) appears as “2018-06-25T19:15:00Z” because EST is five hours behind UTC. Date time pairs always return in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ.

LateCancelled.description:
When `true`, indicates that the class has been `LateCancelled`.
When `false`, indicates that the class has not been `LateCancelled`.

SiteId.description: The ID of the business where the visit is booked.

LocationId.description: The ID of the location where the visit took place or is to take place.

MakeUp.description:
When `true`, the client can make up this session and a session is not deducted from the pricing option that was used to sign the client into the enrollment. When the client has the make-up session, a session is automatically removed from a pricing option that matches the service category of the enrollment and is within the same date range of the missed session.
When `false`, the client cannot make up this session. See [Enrollments: Make-ups](https://support.mindbodyonline.com/s/article/203

ServiceId.description: The unique ID assigned to this pricing option when it was purchased by the client.

ServiceName.description: The name of the pricing option at the site where it was purchased.

Service.description: The details of the pricing option at the site where it was purchased.

ProductId.description: The ID of the pricing option at the site where it was purchased.

SignedIn.description:
When `true`, indicates that the client has been signed in.
When `false`, indicates that the client has not been signed in.

StaffId.description: The ID of the staff member who is teaching the class.

WebSignup.description:
When `true`, indicates that the client signed up online.
When `false`, indicates that the client was signed up by a staff member.

Missed.description:
When `true`, indicates that the class has been `Missed`.
When `false`, indicates that the class has not been `Missed`.

VisitType.description: Indicates the Id of visit type.

TypeGroup.description: Indicates the Id of type group.
